subject: Brionne — a seal-like Pokémon with a round blue body, white ruff-like collar markings, and pink facial markings, shown in a bright aquatic scene
description: A round-bodied blue seal-like creature with white layered collar markings and pink cheek spots stands upright in a luminous, water-adjacent environment. The background shimmers with aqua and white light suggestive of sunlit shallows or splashing water. The creature's posture is upright and animated, with small flippers raised, giving a performative, dance-like quality — consistent with the species' lore as a performer who cheers up its Trainer.
foreground: Round blue seal-like creature with white collar markings and pink cheeks
background: Shimmering aqua and white light, water-adjacent setting
